ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "associated_date" TEXT /* Date the member was first associated with the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the member resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the member resides */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code where the member resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the member resides */,
  "gender_identification" TEXT /* Gender identification of the member */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the member */,
  "preferred_communication" TEXT /* Preferred communication method */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Consent status for data usage */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_campaigns" (
  "member_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member-campaign association */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member participating in the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the member is participating in */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the member participated in the campaign */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of the member in the campaign */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the member completed the campaign */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the member's participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_campaigns_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the condition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_conditions" (
  "member_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member-condition association */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member with the condition */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the member has */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the member was diagnosed with the condition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the condition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_conditions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_types" (
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact type */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the contact type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the contact type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_contacts" (
  "member_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member-contact association */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member being contacted */,
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact type */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date the member was contacted */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Method of contact */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the contact */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_contacts_contact_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_type_id") REFERENCES contact_types ("contact_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_contacts_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radius" (
  "radius_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radius */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the radius */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the radius */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the radius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radius_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_radius" (
  "member_radius_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member-radius association */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "radius_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radius */,
  "radius_date" TEXT /* Date the member was associated with the radius */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the radius association */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the radius association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_radius_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_radius_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_radius_radius_id FOREIGN KEY ("radius_id") REFERENCES radius ("radius_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., support staff, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
